protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “DNA-enriched MIL or IL was successfully integrated into the qPCR buffer without inhibiting the reaction.” (Table 1: static extraction method; add to qPCR buffer)

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Table 1 lists a “Dispersive extraction method” with “Recover the MIL with a magnet” and “Pipette … into the qPCR buffer.”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “The effect of adding a non-ionic surfactant was investigated… The addition of 0.05% Tween20 to the desorption solution improved DNA recovery…”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Fig. 4 caption: “plant cell lysate generated using CTAB, SDS, [MILs]…”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Section heading: “One-pot plant cell lysis and qPCR assay”; “introducing… Tween20 to the reaction buffer… recovered amplification.”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Fig. 10: "Add IL/MIL ... Recover IL/MIL by pipette ... Desorb in qPCR buffer"; also mentions "desorption ... at 90 °C" and compatibility with "sequencing".

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Text compares "commercial one-pot PCR assay" (Phire) and notes lysate used for qPCR quantification; Phire assay described as "one-pot" and "not qPCR compatible".

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: qPCR assays: reactions "containing ... MIL ... or ... IL"; and qPCR buffer includes "0.05% Tween20".

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “Conventional plant cell lysis was performed using the CTAB lysis… suspended in… CTAB lysis buffer (… CTAB…)… After heating… at 60 °C… The sample was centrifuged…”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “SDS lysis was performed… exposed to… Tris–EDTA… for… at 100 °C. Afterwards… centrifuged… and the supernatant was collected…”
